lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Good morrow, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess so.

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: You guess? The sun is shining, the sea breeze is salty, what's not to enjoy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know... The sand? It's coarse and rough and irritating, and it gets everywhere.

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Hmm, well my spa isn't quite ready yet, but when it is, I'm sure that'll solve all of your sand related issues!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: I am Madame Caldarium! A pirate's life was for me, but lately I've been looking to expand my business, I'm getting old, ya see.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A spa business? Do you really think these Corsairs are the washing type?

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Ha! That's what the Rum is for!

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: I'm more concerned of their laziness, 'Can't work today Madame, I'm cursed!'. Bunch of idiots, the lot of 'em.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely you never expected this lot to be any different... They're either stealing, killing or both!

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Yes... I have plans adventurer, the local cave dwelling population are... Let's say, sorting something out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting, I'm sure that'll be an entertaining turn of events.

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: We'll see...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Farewell, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Madame Caldarium
lines.text: I have a question for you.
